mapper.select: SELECT user_pw FROM tbl_user WHERE user_no = #{userNo}

SELECT N.user_nickname AS userNickname, COUNT(A.VOLUN_ACT_NO) AS volunActNo, NVL(SUM(V.VOLUN_ACT_END_TIME - V.VOLUN_ACT_BEGIN_TIME), 0) AS totalVolunTime, NVL(R.RANK_POINT, 0) AS rankPoint, NVL(C.TOTAL_AMOUNT, 0) AS totalAmount FROM TBL_USER N JOIN TBL_VOLUN_APPLY A ON N.USER_NO = A.USER_NO JOIN TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY V ON A.VOLUN_ACT_NO = V.VOLUN_ACT_NO JOIN TBL_RANKING R ON N.USER_NO = R.USER_NO JOIN TBL_CURRENCY C ON N.USER_NO = C.USER_NO WHERE N.USER_NO = #{userNo} GROUP BY N.user_nickname, R.RANK_POINT, C.TOTAL_AMOUNT
SELECT LOG_REASON, TO_CHAR(LOG_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD'), CHANGEPOINT FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND CHANGEPOINT > 0 ORDER BY LOG_NO DESC

SELECT tva.volun_act_title, TO_CHAR( tva.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin ,'yyyy-mm-dd') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR( tva.Volun_Act_Recru_End,'yyyy-mm-dd') FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY tva JOIN TBL_VOLUN_APPLY apl ON tva.volun_act_no = apl.volun_act_no WHERE apl.user_no = #{userNo} AND apl.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS = 1 ORDER BY tva.volun_act_no DESC

SELECT tva.volun_act_title, TO_CHAR( tva.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin ,'yyyy-mm-dd') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR( tva.Volun_Act_Proc_End,'yyyy-mm-dd') FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY tva JOIN TBL_VOLUN_APPLY apl ON tva.volun_act_no = apl.volun_act_no WHERE apl.user_no = #{userNo} AND apl.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS = 2 ORDER BY tva.volun_act_no DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_user SET user_nickname = #{userNickname}, user_email = #{userEmail}, user_pw = #{userPw}, user_phone_num = #{userPhoneNum}, user_address = #{userAddress}, user_address_detail = #{userAddressDetail}, user_postnum = #{userPostnum}, WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND user_type = #{userType}

UPDATE tbl_user SET user_email = #{userEmail}, user_pw = #{userPw}, user_address = #{userAddress}, user_address_detail = #{userAddressDetail}, user_postnum = #{userPostNum}, user_phone_num = #{userPhoneNum} WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND user_type = #{userType}
mapper.select: SELECT tva.volun_act_title, TO_CHAR( tva.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin ,'yyyy-mm-dd') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR( tva.Volun_Act_Recru_End,'yyyy-mm-dd') FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY tva JOIN TBL_VOLUN_APPLY apl ON tva.volun_act_no = apl.volun_act_no WHERE apl.user_no = #{userNo} AND apl.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS = 1 ORDER BY tva.volun_act_no DESC

SELECT tva.volun_act_title, TO_CHAR( tva.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin ,'yyyy-mm-dd') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR( tva.Volun_Act_Recru_End,'yyyy-mm-dd') FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY tva JOIN TBL_VOLUN_APPLY apl ON tva.volun_act_no = apl.volun_act_no WHERE apl.user_no = #{userNo} AND apl.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS = 2 ORDER BY tva.volun_act_no DESC
SELECT log_reason, TO_CHAR(LOG_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD'), change_amount FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_no = #{userNo} AND CHANGE_AMOUNT < 0 ORDER BY LOG_NO DESC
SELECT log_reason, TO_CHAR(LOG_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD'), change_amount FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_no = #{userNo} AND CHANGE_AMOUNT > 0 ORDER BY LOG_NO DESC
SELECT tcp.postNo, tcp.postTitle, tcp.postDate, tpl.postLikeNo FROM tbl_community_post tcp JOIN tbl_post_like tpl ON tcp.userno = #{userNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_LOG_POINT(Log_No, User_No, Currency_ID, Change_Amount, Log_Reason, Log_Date) VALUES (SEQ_TBL_LOG_POINT.nextval, #{userNo}, #{currencyId}, #{changeAmount}, #{logReason}, sysdate)
